You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/components/modals/ProjectNameHelp.tsx

### Fix 1

Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: plain

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   25      >
   26        <Button variant={ButtonVariant.plain} aria-label="View naming information">
   27          <OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon />

```

### Fix 2
Line: 26
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Popover

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   25      >
   26        <Button variant={ButtonVariant.plain} aria-label="View naming information">
   27          <OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon />

```

### Fix 3
Line: 3
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

```

    4  import { OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

### Fix 4
Line: 3
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Strategy: LlmAssisted

```
    4  import { OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

### Fix 5
Line: 3
Rule [semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <TextContent> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - TextContent.className  →  Content.className
  - TextContent.children  →  Content.children
  - TextContent.isVisited  →  Content.isVisitedLink (renamed)

Remove <TextContent> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove TextContent from the import statement.

  importedName: TextContent
  localName: TextContent
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```

    4  import { OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon } from '@patternfly/react-icons';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/components/modals/ProjectNameHelp.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 26): `Button.variant` type changed — `'plain'` is still valid in the new type. The value `ButtonVariant.plain` is still valid. No change needed.

**Fix 2** (Line 26): Icon children must move to `icon` prop. The Button contains only `<OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon />` as a child, so it should become self-closing with `icon={<OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon />}`.

**Fix 3** (Line 3): Popover behavioral change regarding Popper's `appendTo`. This is a test-impact warning about Popover. No code change needed in the source file — it's informational about tests.

**Fix 4** (Line 3): Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>`. The `<Text component="p">` becomes `<Content component="p">`. Remove `Text` from imports, add `Content`.

**Fix 5** (Line 3): Replace `<TextContent>` with `<Content>`. The `<TextContent>` wrapper becomes `<Content>`. Remove `TextContent` from imports. Since Fix 4 also migrates `Text` to `Content`, we need to handle the nesting. In PF v6, `<Content>` replaces both `<TextContent>` and `<Text>`. The outer `<TextContent>` becomes `<Content>`, and the inner `<Text component="p">` also becomes `<Content component="p">`.

Let me apply all changes:

- Import: Replace `Text, TextContent` with `Content`
- `<TextContent>` → `<Content>`
- `<Text component="p">` → `<Content component="p">`
- Button: move icon child to `icon` prop, make self-closing

arguments.after: import { Button, ButtonVariant, Content, Popover } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Button, ButtonVariant, Popover, Text, TextContent } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<Content>
          <Content component="p">
            {t(`A Project name must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters or '-', and must start
            and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'my-name' or '123-abc').`)}
          </Content>
          <Content component="p">
            {t(`You must create a Namespace to be able to create projects that begin with 'openshift-',
            'kubernetes-', or 'kube-'.`)}
          </Content>
        </Content>
arguments.before:
<TextContent>
          <Text component="p">
            {t(`A Project name must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters or '-', and must start
            and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'my-name' or '123-abc').`)}
          </Text>
          <Text component="p">
            {t(`You must create a Namespace to be able to create projects that begin with 'openshift-',
            'kubernetes-', or 'kube-'.`)}
          </Text>
        </TextContent>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct. All changes are applied cleanly. Let me verify there are no unused imports:

- `Button` — used on line 26 ✓
- `ButtonVariant` — used on line 26 ✓
- `Content` — used on lines 14, 15, 19 ✓
- `Popover` — used on line 11 ✓
- `OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon` — used on line 26 (in `icon` prop) ✓
- `Text` — removed ✓ (no longer referenced)
- `TextContent` — removed ✓ (no longer referenced)

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.plain` is still valid in the new type union (only `'stateful'` was added; no values were removed). |
| **Fix 2** | Icon children to `icon` prop on Button | **Applied** | Moved `<OutlinedQuestionCircleIcon />` from Button children to the `icon` prop; made Button self-closing. |
| **Fix 3** | Popover transitive behavioral changes | **No change needed** | This is an informational/test-impact warning about Popover's Popper `appendTo` default change. No source code change required; no companion test files were listed. |
| **Fix 4** | Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>` | **Applied** | Replaced both `<Text component="p">` elements with `<Content component="p">`; removed `Text` from import; added `Content` to import. |
| **Fix 5** | Replace `<TextContent>` with `<Content>` | **Applied** | Replaced the outer `<TextContent>` wrapper with `<Content>`; removed `TextContent` from import (already covered by `Content` added in Fix 4). |
